question: How many customers do we have in total?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_customers FROM customers LIMIT 1000

question: List the top 10 customers by total spending
expected_sql: SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(i.Total) AS total_spent FROM customers c JOIN invoices i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the total revenue by country?
expected_sql: SELECT c.Country, SUM(i.Total) AS total_revenue FROM invoices i JOIN customers c ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId GROUP BY c.Country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1000

question: Show me all tracks with their album and artist names
expected_sql: SELECT t.Name AS track, al.Title AS album, ar.Name AS artist FROM tracks t JOIN albums al ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId JOIN artists ar ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId LIMIT 1000

question: Find all customers from the United States
expected_sql: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE Country = 'USA' LIMIT 1000

question: What were the total sales in 2022?
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) AS total_sales FROM invoices WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2022' LIMIT 1

question: Rank artists by number of tracks they have
expected_sql: SELECT ar.Name, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS track_count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(t.TrackId) DESC) AS artist_rank FROM artists ar JOIN albums al ON ar.ArtistId = al.ArtistId JOIN tracks t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId LIMIT 1000

question: Which customers have spent more than the average customer?
expected_sql: SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(i.Total) AS total_spent FROM customers c JOIN invoices i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId HAVING total_spent > (SELECT AVG(customer_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(Total) AS customer_total FROM invoices GROUP BY CustomerId)) LIMIT 1000

question: How many unique countries are our customers from?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Country) AS unique_countries FROM customers LIMIT 1

question: What is the average track length by genre?
expected_sql: SELECT g.Name AS genre, AVG(t.Milliseconds) / 60000.0 AS avg_minutes FROM tracks t JOIN genres g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY g.GenreId ORDER BY avg_minutes DESC LIMIT 1000

question: Which albums have the most tracks?
expected_sql: SELECT al.Title, ar.Name AS artist, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS track_count FROM albums al JOIN artists ar ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId JOIN tracks t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId GROUP BY al.AlbumId ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 10

question: Show monthly revenue for the last 12 months
expected_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) AS month, SUM(Total) AS revenue FROM invoices GROUP BY month ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

question: List all employees and their managers
expected_sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee, m.FirstName || ' ' || m.LastName AS manager FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.ReportsTo = m.EmployeeId LIMIT 1000

question: What is the most popular track by number of purchases?
expected_sql: SELECT t.Name AS track, COUNT(ii.InvoiceLineId) AS purchase_count FROM invoice_items ii JOIN tracks t ON ii.TrackId = t.TrackId GROUP BY ii.TrackId ORDER BY purchase_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage of total revenue comes from each country?
expected_sql: SELECT c.Country, SUM(i.Total) AS revenue, ROUND(SUM(i.Total) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(Total) FROM invoices), 2) AS pct FROM invoices i JOIN customers c ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId GROUP BY c.Country ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1000

question: How many tracks are in each media type format?
expected_sql: SELECT mt.Name AS media_type, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS track_count FROM tracks t JOIN media_types mt ON t.MediaTypeId = mt.MediaTypeId GROUP BY mt.MediaTypeId ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 1000

question: Which playlists have more than 50 tracks?
expected_sql: SELECT p.Name AS playlist, COUNT(pt.TrackId) AS track_count FROM playlists p JOIN playlist_track pt ON p.PlaylistId = pt.PlaylistId GROUP BY p.PlaylistId HAVING track_count > 50 ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 1000

question: Which customers haven't made a purchase in the last 2 years?
expected_sql: SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName, MAX(i.InvoiceDate) AS last_purchase FROM customers c LEFT JOIN invoices i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId HAVING last_purchase < date('now', '-2 years') OR last_purchase IS NULL LIMIT 1000

question: Show cumulative revenue over time by month
expected_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) AS month, SUM(Total) AS monthly_revenue, SUM(SUM(Total)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate)) AS cumulative_revenue FROM invoices GROUP BY month ORDER BY month LIMIT 1000

question: Find all tracks with 'love' in the title
expected_sql: SELECT t.Name AS track, al.Title AS album, ar.Name AS artist FROM tracks t JOIN albums al ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId JOIN artists ar ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId WHERE LOWER(t.Name) LIKE '%love%' ORDER BY t.Name LIMIT 1000
